title: Maintain grain quality in storage
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Maintain grain quality in storage demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Maintain hygiene in storage areas

pcs.text: Test storage conditions and facilities for compliance with grain storage hygiene standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Test storage conditions and facilities for compliance with grain storage hygiene standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Test storage conditions and facilities for compliance with grain storage hygiene standards.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, report or repair damage and faults to storage areas according to workplace procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply treatments to storage facilities to ensure hygiene standards are maintained according to grain storage program.
